pred_reason: The contract contains reentrancy vulnerabilities in unstaking and token transfer functions without proper guards, aligning with SWC-107. Multiple arithmetic operations lack overflow/underflow protection despite SafeMath usage, corresponding to SWC-101. Evidence: Reentrancy found in unStake, emergencyUnstake, and sendToken functions without ReentrancyGuard; Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern violated in ERC-20 transfers; Integer overflows possible in staking calculations despite SafeMath references
